zh.lifeSummary: 當Aimable de RANCON於大約1206年出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安吉薩時，她的父親Geoffroi V de RANCON33歲，母親Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES35歲。她於大約1226年與Guillaume V de PARTHENAY在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1269年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aimable de RANCON于大约1206年出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安吉薩时，她的父亲Geoffroi V de RANCON33岁，母亲Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES35岁。她于大约1226年与Guillaume V de PARTHENAY在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1269年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯帕特尼享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: RANCON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Rando
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Ignazio, Giuseppe, Marco, Philomena, Santo, Tommaso.
Italian (Sicily): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando (see Randon ), or from a short form of such (related) names as Bertrando (see Bertram ) or Randolfo (see Randolph ).

variants.name: Randall
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

nameMeanings.name: Aimable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French and Middle English female personal name Amabil, Amabel, Latin Amabilis ‘lovable’. The Normans frequently made use of the Old French short form Mabile or Mabel (see Mable ) and, by dissimilation of m to n, developed a new form, Anabel, which gave rise to surnames such as Annable and Hannibal .

variants.name: Mable
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

variants.name: Annable
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Aimable de RANCON was born about 1206, in Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, her father, Geoffroi V de RANCON, was 33 and her mother, Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, was 35. She married Guillaume V de PARTHENAY about 1226, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died about 1269, in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aimable de RANCON est née environ 1206, à Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Geoffroi V de RANCON, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume V de PARTHENAY environ 1226, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1269, à Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aimable de RANCON um 1206 in Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroi V de RANCON 33 und ihre Mutter Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES 35. Sie hat um 1226 in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Guillaume V de PARTHENAY geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1269 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aimable de RANCON è nata il circa 1206 nel Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroi V de RANCON, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume V de PARTHENAY circa 1226, nel Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1269, nel Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aimable de RANCONが約1206年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンジェンcアイで生まれた時，父Geoffroi V de RANCONは33歳，母Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERESは35歳であった。約1226年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスパースエナイでGuillaume V de PARTHENAYと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1269年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスパースエナイで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aimable de RANCON(이)가 대략 1206년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 c아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroi V de RANCON(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1226년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 Guillaume V de PARTHENAY(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1269년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 파르테나이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1206–ABT 1269: tany ho any amin'ny 1206–tany ho any amin'ny 1269

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aimable de RANCON nasceu aproximadamente 1206, em Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Geoffroi V de RANCON, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume V de PARTHENAY aproximadamente 1226, em Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1269, em Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aimable de RANCON родилась около 1206 г. в местности дженcеи, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroi V de RANCON было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume V de PARTHENAY около 1226 г. в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1269 г. в местности партенеи, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aimable de RANCON nació aproximadamente 1206, en Gençay, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi V de RANCON, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jeanne MAINGOT de SURGERES, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Guillaume V de PARTHENAY aproximadamente 1226, en Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1269, en Parthenay, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
